title: Name shapes 3
description: Practice identifying circles, triangles, squares, rectangles, rhombuses, trapezoids, and hexagons.

hints:
A rhombus has $4$ sides.

All $4$ sides are the same length.

This shape is not a rhombus.  It has $5$ sides.

![A purple shape with 5 sides.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3a0c1de8da20e566a83add08b770fb24.png)

This shape is not a rhombus.  It has $6$ sides.

![A blue shape with 6 sides.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6a87fe1d53101c2b717252f5b0fc6491.png)

This shape is a rhombus:  

![A green shape with 4 sides the same length.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a4894e045c417a1bc2f90b57532d37ea.png)  
It has $4$ sides.

All $4$ sides are the same length.

All $4$ corners are the same.

hints:

A trapezoid has $4$ sides.

At least $2$ sides are parallel.

Parallel sides go in the same direction. They never get closer together or farther apart. Rails on a train track are parallel.

This shape is not a trapezoid.  It has $3$ sides.  

![A green shape with 3 sides.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/54c6240f5bbeb49fc281c488b6951936.png)

This shape is not a trapezoid.  It has $6$ sides.  
![A blue shape with 6 sides.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6a87fe1d53101c2b717252f5b0fc6491.png)

This shape is a trapezoid:  
![A purple shape with 4 sides. Two sides have double marks showing they are parallel.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/320a29dd220a09503d4b697f5d9860cc92dbd55c)  
It has $4$ sides.

Exactly $2$ sides are parallel.

choices.content: ![A purple shape with 4 sides. Two sides are parallel. ](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fc98abe247fa1b1fb9ce7163c4d5775a93442c61)
